name: @kitwork/kitjs
description: Not a framework. A ~15KB kernel — IR walker, bytecode-style expressions, delegated events — that makes plain HTML behave like it has one: expressions, two-way model, validation, live SSE, SPA morph. No build, no eval, no dependencies. JIT-delivered by the Kitwork engine.
author: Huỳnh Nhân Quốc (https://github.com/huynhnhanquoc)
